title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event Details
text: Campus & accommodation tour 25 September Event Status: Completed Date & Time: September 25, 2025 3:00 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Book now Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first-hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: This section details a completed in-person Campus & accommodation tour event held on September 25, 2025, at the University of Southampton Delhi. The event offered attendees a chance to explore facilities and experience campus life at its Gurgaon location.
